name: open-claude-code
description: AI coding assistant powered by Claude — Cursor-style chat panel with file context, code apply, tool visualization and more

chatParticipants.name: claude
chatParticipants.description: AI coding assistant powered by Claude. Ask about your code, run tools, edit files.

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clear conversation history and start a new session

commands.title: Open Claude Code: Set API Key
Open Claude Code: Open Chat Panel
Open Claude Code: Apply Code to Active File
Open Claude Code: Inline Edit Selection (Ctrl+K)

enumDescriptions: NVIDIA NIM — Moonshot AI Kimi K2.5 (full tool access; enable nvidiaThinkingMode for reasoning mode)
NVIDIA NIM — DeepSeek R1 (full tool access; enable nvidiaThinkingMode for reasoning mode)
openClaudeCode.model.description: AI model to use for the chat participant

openClaudeCode.nvidiaApiKey.description: NVIDIA NIM API key (from integrate.api.nvidia.com). Required when using any NVIDIA-hosted model.

openClaudeCode.nvidiaThinkingMode.description: Enable extended thinking (reasoning) mode for capable NVIDIA NIM models (kimi-k2.5, deepseek-r1). When enabled, the model reasons step-by-step but cannot use live tools (Read, Bash, Grep, etc.) — a workspace snapshot is injected instead. When disabled (default), these models use full tool-calling mode just like any other provider.

enumDescriptions: Ask for permission before each tool use
Plan mode — read only, no file edits
Automatically accept file edits without asking
openClaudeCode.permissionMode.description: Permission mode for file and shell operations

openClaudeCode.maxTurns.description: Maximum agentic tool-use turns per chat request

openClaudeCode.showToolOutput.description: Show tool progress and results inline in chat

openClaudeCode.enableWebviewPanel.description: Show the Cursor-style sidebar chat panel (requires reload)

openClaudeCode.autoAttachActiveFile.description: Automatically include the currently active editor file as context with every message sent

openClaudeCode.pinnedFiles.description: File paths pinned to every new conversation as context
